hero.description: Access over <1>10,000 collections</1> of textbooks, journals, and learning materials in Audio, Digital Braille, DAISY, and Accessible PDF formats — exclusively for UB students.
hero.search_placeholder: Search by title, author, or category...

features.label: What Do They Say?
features.title: Learn Easier with Pustakability
features.text1: Pustakability really helps me in my English Literature classes. The books have been converted to Audio and Digital Braille formats so I can follow the materials just like sighted students without needing to request rescans.
features.text2: As a low-vision student, I often struggle to read regular PDFs because the fonts are too small and the images are unclear. In Pustakability, the PDFs are well-structured and the OpenDyslexic font is very helpful!
features.text3: The DAISY feature is amazing. When I need references for assignments, it's very easy to jump to chapter 3, jump to page 45, etc. The navigation is perfect for blind users.

howToAccess.label: How to Access Pustakability?
howToAccess.title: Four Easy Steps
howToAccess.desc: We are committed to ensuring that students with print disabilities at Universitas Brawijaya can access course materials easily and without barriers.
howToAccess.step1_desc: Ensure you are registered as a PLD UB assisted student. Registration can be done via UB SSO or by contacting our counselors.
howToAccess.step2_desc: PLD Admins will verify your student status and disability type to provide appropriate access.
howToAccess.step3_desc: Search for the books you need and select the format that best suits your accessibility needs (Audio, DAISY, Braille, etc.).
howToAccess.step4_desc: Read books directly from your browser or download the files to read offline on your device.
howToAccess.contact_desc: The PLD UB team is ready to assist you through the registration process and ensure you get access to the most suitable format.

footer.desc: Accessible digital library for print disabled students at Universitas Brawijaya.
footer.copyright: Copyright © 2026 - Subdirectorate of Disability Services and Inclusive Education, Brawijaya University

accessibilityFeatures.label: Accessibility Features
accessibilityFeatures.title: Designed for Every Reading Style
accessibilityFeatures.desc: Pustakability provides a variety of features so every UB student can access information in the way that is most comfortable for them.

audio.title: Audio & Text-to-Speech
audio.desc: Listen to books with adjustable speed and voice. Supports Indonesian and English.

braille.title: Digital Braille
braille.desc: Content available in BRF (Braille Ready Format) compatible with braille displays and embossers.

daisy.title: DAISY Book
daisy.desc: Digital Accessible Information System format with structured navigation per chapter, page, and paragraph.

dyslexic.title: Dyslexia-Friendly Font
dyslexic.desc: Choose OpenDyslexic font, large text size, and wide line spacing for reading ease.

nightMode.title: Night Reading Mode
nightMode.desc: Comfortable dark mode and various color themes for users with low vision or light sensitivity.

screenReader.title: Screen Reader Ready
screenReader.desc: Fully compatible with NVDA, JAWS, and VoiceOver. Every element is equipped with complete ARIA labels.

accessibilityStatement.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibilityStatement.desc1: Pustakability is committed to meeting WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards. If you encounter accessibility barriers, please contact the PLD UB team at

cta.title: Start Your Learning Journey Today
cta.desc: Join over 1,200 UB students who have experienced the ease of learning without accessibility barriers.

login.title: Log in to Pustakability
login.subtitle: Access Universitas Brawijaya's accessible digital collection
login.error_mismatch: Email or password does not match.

register.success_desc_user: Your account is being verified by the PLD UB team. We will send an activation email to your email address within 1-3 business days.
register.success_desc_volunteer: Your volunteer registration is being reviewed by the admin. You will receive an email notification once approved.
register.have_account: Already have an account? Log in
register.title: Register for Pustakability
register.role_user_desc: Full access to the entire e-book collection. For students with print disabilities registered at PLD UB.
register.role_vol_desc: Can contribute by adding books to the collection, with admin validation before being displayed.
register.verification_note: Verification by the PLD UB team is required before the account is active.

volunteerDashboard.title: Volunteer Dashboard
volunteerDashboard.greeting: Hello, <1>{{name}}</1>! Contribute books to the Pustakability collection.
volunteerDashboard.validation_info_desc: After you submit a book, the Pustakability admin team will review it within 1-3 business days. You will receive an email notification once the book is approved or rejected.
volunteerDashboard.form_success_desc: Your book is being reviewed by the admin. Redirecting to submissions page...
volunteerDashboard.field_desc_placeholder: Describe the content and purpose of this book...
volunteerDashboard.field_book_text_placeholder: Copy and paste the book's text here to be read by the Screen Reader...
volunteerDashboard.copyright_info_desc: Ensure the book you are submitting is free of copyright or has appropriate distribution permissions. Submissions violating copyright will be rejected immediately.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.subtitle: Manage users, book collections, and validate volunteer contributions
